name: Crisp Apple Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the butter and graham cracker crumbs in a 1 1/2 quart baking dish; mix well.
2. Press the mixture evenly over the bottom of the dish.
3. In a medium bowl, combine the sweetened condensed milk, sour cream, and lemon juice. Spread this mixture over the crumb layer.
4. Spoon the apple pie filling on top of the mixture.
5. Bake at 350°F for 25-30 minutes.
6. Cool slightly.
7. Mix the walnuts and cinnamon together.
8. Sprinkle the walnut-cinnamon mixture over the pie.
9. Serve warm or cold. You may substitute other flavors of pie filling, and you can add the walnut topping 5-10 minutes before the pie is done.
